failures.description: The agent misinterpreted or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items, even though the tool returned two matching available RGB mechanical keyboards above $233.90.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned count=2 with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. The Executor then synthesized an answer that directly contradicts that output by saying no items match. This is not an invalid tool invocation or underspecified intent; the query and result were clear. The later Evaluator repeats the same misreading instead of resolving it.
